title: UNDP-EVALUATION — PROJECT ORION — UNDER EVALUATION
entry: UNDP evaluation notification received March 10, 2026 at 12:56 PM. PROJECT ORION - Passive Tri-Axis Gradiometer for Underwater EO Detection - status changed to Under Evaluation. Submitted by Sheldon K. Salmon. UNDP Affordable Tools challenge. Prize target $20,000 USD.
project: PROJECT ORION v2.1 — Passive Tri-Axis Magnetometer Gradiometer System
author: Sheldon K. Salmon
